zh.Lewes District, East Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可列維斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Morton於1474年出生在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可列維斯時，她的父親Ralph Moreton24歲，母親Joanna Webbe30歲。她於大約1490年與Sir John Fitz Randolph在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1506年在英國素可列維斯享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Morton于1474年出生在英国英格兰易亞斯特 素可列維斯时，她的父亲Ralph Moreton24岁，母亲Joanna Webbe30岁。她于大约1490年与Sir John Fitz Randolph在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1506年在英国素可列維斯享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

variants.name: Moreton
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Murton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places in northern England, all named in Old English as ‘settlement or enclosure at the marsh or moor’, from mōr ‘marsh, fen, moor’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. There has been considerable confusion with both Morton and Merton .

variants.name: Morten
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Morton was born in 1474, in Lewes, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Moreton, was 24 and her mother, Joanna Webbe, was 30. She married Sir John Fitz Randolph about 1490, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1506, in Lewes, Sussex, England, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Morton est née en 1474, à Lewes, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Moreton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joanna Webbe, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Fitz Randolph environ 1490, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1506, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans.

Sie hat um 1490 in England, United Kingdom Sir John Fitz Randolph geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1506 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Lewes, Sussex, England.

Lei sposato Sir John Fitz Randolph circa 1490, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1506, nel Lewes, Sussex, England, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mortonが1474年にイギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスルスで生まれた時，父Ralph Moretonは24歳，母Joanna Webbeは30歳であった。約1490年にイギリスイギリスでSir John Fitz Randolphと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1506年にイギリススセックスルスで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Morton(이)가 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 루스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Moreton(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Webbe(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1490년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John Fitz Randolph(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1506년 영국 수세스 루스에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Fitz Randolph aproximadamente 1490, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Morton родилась в 1474 г. в местности львесь, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Moreton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Webbe, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Fitz Randolph около 1490 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1506 г. в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 32 лет.
